---
title: "Image gallery"
format: html
filters:
   - lightbox
lightbox: auto
---

::: {style="display: grid;grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(150px, 1fr));grid-gap: 1em;"}

![](img/nhboat.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![](img/ncoysterreef.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![](img/nahantview.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![](img/nhmshells.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![](img/shoalssunset.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![](img/ffpeoysters.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![](tjarnostar.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![](histologydrawer.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![](maineboat.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

:::
